issues.description: Missing entire first effect: '[Opponent's Turn] If your Leader has the {Foxy Pirates} type, give all of your opponent's Characters −1000 power.' Only the [Activate: Main] effect is present.
Trigger should be 'Activated' with activation phase 'Main' specified in condition, not just 'Activated'. Current DSL lacks activation context.
Action 'GiveDon' is incorrect. The effect should 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck' which translates to 'SearchDeck' (search for DON!! from deck), not 'GiveDon' (gain DON!! tokens).
